## Build information
<!-- Click the version chip in the sidebar (or visit /version in the
     browser) and paste the output here. This tells us the exact commit
     that produced the bug. -->

- **Build ID**: `<paste here>` (e.g. `1.0.0+d160ce3`)
- **Build time**: `<paste here>`
- **Python version**: `<paste here>`
- **Platform**: `<paste here>`

## Environment

- **OS**: <!-- macOS 14.4 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / ... -->
- **Browser**: <!-- Chrome 131 / Firefox 133 / Safari 18 / ... -->
- **Frontend dev server port**: <!-- 5173 / 5174 / 5175 / other -->

## Logs / screenshots / payload
<!-- Paste any relevant output. For backend errors, the uvicorn stack
     trace is usually enough. For frontend bugs, a DevTools → Console
     screenshot. For data discrepancies, attach the exported CSV/JSON. -->

```

```

     one drug / one trial? Intermittent vs reproducible? -->
